mutantItems.infInsertMutant: Back then, the city was already using paper money (a type of joss paper resembling banknotes burnt to venerate the deceased, ancestor spirits, deities, etc.), producing brocade, it excelled in literature and medicine, and had "6000 bridges, so tall that a boat could pass underneath, or maybe even two boats together."
mutantItems.infInsertMeaning: a type of joss paper resembling banknotes burnt to venerate the deceased, ancestor spirits, deities, etc.

marked_sentence: Back then, the city was already using [|term:paper money|], producing brocade, it excelled in literature and medicine, and had "6000 bridges, so tall that a boat could pass underneath, or maybe even two boats together."
refer_trans: 这里还有“6000座石桥” “每座之高，足以让船只通过”

mutantItems.infInsertMutant: Well, anyway... he said, considering this turning point (a decisive point at which a significant change or historical event occurs, or at which a decision must be made) in your life, you know, losing so much so suddenly, that being involved in the future would be the best therapy in the world for you right now.
mutantItems.infInsertMeaning: a decisive point at which a significant change or historical event occurs, or at which a decision must be made

marked_sentence: Well, anyway... he said, considering this [|term:turning point|] in your life, you know, losing so much so suddenly, that being involved in the future would be the best therapy in the world for you right now.
refer_trans: 他说，考虑到这是你的人生转折点

mutantItems.infInsertMutant: they married for love. no motive for suicide. don't jump to conclusions. but it was probably a heart attack (death or failure) or something. he said, "It hurts, " and grabbed his throat. you saw the mark on his neck.

marked_sentence: they married for love. no motive for suicide. don't jump to conclusions. but it was probably a [|term:heart attack|] or something. he said, "It hurts, " and grabbed his throat. you saw the mark on his neck.
